baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Grill me on this plan: move checkout into a background job and show users a pending state.
evals.expected_output: The agent starts a structured interview, asks exactly one load-bearing question at a time, includes its recommended answer, and tracks settled versus unresolved decisions.
assertions: Identifies the plan or the smallest missing context needed to start.
Asks one question, not a list of questions.
Includes a recommended answer with the question.
Tracks settled decisions and unresolved branches as the interview proceeds.

evals.prompt: Grill my plan to replace our auth middleware. The repo is available locally.
evals.expected_output: The agent checks discoverable codebase facts before asking questions whose answers are in the repo, then uses that evidence in the grilling interview.
assertions: Explores relevant local files before asking about discoverable facts.
Does not ask the user to restate information available in the codebase.
Asks one evidence-informed question at a time.
Stops only when load-bearing branches are settled, open, or assigned a follow-up artifact.
